2026-04-08T23:25:44.0321470Z 
2026-04-08T23:25:44.0323237Z The agent output is simply `{"items":[{"item_number":57961,"labels":["needs-triage"],"type":"add_labels"}],"errors":[]}` — adding a `needs-triage` label to issue #57961. This is exactly what the Agentic Triage workflow intends to do. No patch was produced, no secrets are exposed, and no prompt injection is evident.
